white speckle mug

$60.00

sold out

Make each cup of tea or coffee feel special with a Ghost Wares ceramic mug. A wheel thrown, matte textured vessel in our white speckle finish with a clear glazed interior.

Handmade stoneware.

Size: approx. 9.5 x 13 x 7cm

Volume: approx. 350ml

Suitable for use in dishwashers and microwave ovens. Care should be taken when stacking and washing ceramics. Avoid thermal shock from rapid heating and cooling.
